#header.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.header.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.logo.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.logo img.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.toggle-sidebar-btn.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.lm_icon.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.search-form.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.rules.background: rgb(193, 9, 48) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
